message:
test(ftui-extras): cover traceback.rs helper functions, render paths, and edge cases (bd-3abir)

Add 46 new tests (25→71 total) covering: display_width/grapheme_width/
ascii_display_width helpers, is_zero_width_codepoint ranges, digit_count
large values, style() builder, Debug/Clone derives, render with offset
area, multiple frames, truncated height, error-line-outside-range,
lineno alignment, frame equality variants, Into<String> conversions,
and empty/edge-case source contexts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
